name: magpie-industries-sc
description: A Star Citizen community web application for orgs, friend groups, and solo players.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names client,server --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
